scripts.prerelease: pnpm build && cd dist && rm -rf _metadata && zip -r -X --exclude='*.DS_Store' ../subtitle-extractor-v$(node -p "require('../package.json').version").zip . && cd ..
scripts.release: V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && pnpm prerelease && gh release create v$V subtitle-extractor-v$V.zip --title "v$V" --notes "Release v$V"
